user_message: Review PR #184 document `docs/brainstorms/hypothesis-validation-framework.md` for feasibility as ce-doc-review. Document type: requirements. Origin: none. Focus only on requirement-level feasibility: architecture conflicts, assumptions that block the effort, existing code capabilities. Return concise JSON-ish findings with severity, section, evidence quotes. Key doc claims: Approach 1 config suppresses proactive injection and records injection_block; Approach 2 samples accepted auto_apply outcomes with label blinding; Approach 3 ranking_snapshots persist diff text and ranked_results, written by rank_related_decisions callers, reusing content_filter redaction; Approach 4 raw transcript injection path absent.
assistant_summary: Using `compound-engineering:ce-doc-review` because you requested a feasibility review of a requirements document; I’ll first load its instructions, then inspect the doc and the relevant existing code paths read-only.
